  • Module

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Card
    Represents a playing card with a rank and suit.
    CardCombo
    Represents a combination of cards in poker.
    ChatMessage
    Represents a chat message exchanged in the poker game.
    ClientEndpoint
    Handles the network communication from the client's side.
    ClientMain
    Entry point for the client-side of the poker application using JavaFX.
    Deck
    The Deck class represents a standard deck of playing cards.
    GameParameters
    Defines the constant configuration parameters for the poker game.
    HandRanking
    Enum representing the different hand rankings in poker.
    MenuView
    Represents the main menu view of the Poker Texas Hold'em client application.
    MyUtils
    Utility class for handling sprite indexing and related constants used for rendering cards and UI elements in the poker game.
    MyUtils.Sprites
    Enumeration of special sprites used in the UI (non-card elements).
    Player
    Player class represents a participant in the poker game.
    PlayerRepresentation
    Represents a player in a representation of the poker game that is being sent over the server.
    PokerTableView
    Represents the poker table view in the client application.
    Rank
    Represents the ranks of cards in a standard deck.
    Server
    Server listens for client connections and manages the poker game logic.
    ServerEndpoint
    ServerEndpoint handles communication with a connected client.
    ServerMain
    Entry point for the server-side of the poker application.
    Suit
    Represents the four suits in a standard deck of playing cards.
    Table
    Represents a table in a poker game.
    TableRepresentation
    Represents the state of the poker table from the client's perspective.
